mapper.sql: sys_point_id, robot_point_id, map_id, robot_id, point_name, point_code, point_type, coordinate_x, coordinate_y, status, order_num, tenant_id, voice_type, before_msg, during_msg, after_msg, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, del_flag
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM sys_point WHERE map_id = #{mapId} AND del_flag = '0' ORDER BY order_num ASC, sys_point_id ASC

SELECT
FROM sys_point WHERE sys_point_id = #{sysPointId} AND del_flag = '0'

SELECT
FROM sys_point WHERE robot_id = #{robotId} AND del_flag = '0' ORDER BY order_num ASC, sys_point_id ASC

SELECT
FROM sys_point WHERE map_id IN
#{mapId}
AND del_flag = '0' ORDER BY order_num ASC, sys_point_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_point ( robot_point_id, map_id, robot_id, point_name, point_code, point_type, coordinate_x, coordinate_y, status, order_num, tenant_id, voice_type, before_msg, during_msg, after_msg, create_by, create_time, remark, del_flag ) VALUES ( #{robotPointId}, #{mapId}, #{robotId}, #{pointName}, #{pointCode}, #{pointType}, #{coordinateX}, #{coordinateY}, IFNULL(#{status}, '1'), IFNULL(#{orderNum}, 0), #{tenantId}, IFNULL(#{voiceType}, 'default'), #{beforeMsg}, #{duringMsg}, #{afterMsg}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{remark}, IFNULL(#{delFlag}, '0') )
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM sys_point WHERE sys_point_id IN
#{sysPointId}
